notes: Auto-staged from the source batch runner. Review evidence, enrich, run QA, then merge approved rows.
review_notes: Manual public review promoted H2Flow Plumbing and Chisholm Plumbing, Heating & Air Conditioning after official site/contact evidence plus BBB owner evidence verified public business identity, public business contact paths, and owners Phillip H. Waters and John B Chisholm. Gateway Supply Co was rejected because official and Watsco public evidence verify it as a plumbing/HVAC supplier/distributor and showroom, not a local plumbing service contractor. No raw rows merged.
merge_notes: Merged 2 Greenville plumbing rows after reviewed final artifacts and QA. Master row count 500 -> 502. H2Flow Plumbing uses BBB owner evidence for Phillip H. Waters plus official site contact evidence. Chisholm Plumbing, Heating & Air Conditioning uses official contact/about pages and BBB owner evidence for John B Chisholm. Gateway Supply Co remains rejected as a supplier/distributor and was not merged.
